_finding: A frontier model (gpt-5.5) reintroduces independent live-OSV >=HIGH dependency risk on real risky-PR replay tasks at the risky-design rate above; this is REALNESS evidence (oracle-only, gate-independent) that bridges the disjoint-generator gap on the prevalence/realness axis. Gate-effectiveness on these outputs was NOT measurable: the frozen-evidence gate is structurally blind to the recent advisories the live oracle uses (blocked 0/62 P3), so no gate mitigation result is claimed for this generator.
_caveat: Observational; single ecosystem (PyPI); real-PR task population (U3); commercial frontier generator (U1). NOT a gate-effectiveness result.
